items.name: webapp-testing
items.title: Webapp Testing
items.description: Verify a web application works correctly in a real browser using Playwright. Covers page navigation, form submission, user interactions, console error detection, screenshot capture, and responsive layout checking. Use when you need to confirm a UI feature actually works end-to-end, catch regressions after a change, verify a form flow completes, or check that the page is free of console errors. Requires Node.js; installs Playwright if not already present.
items.author: Khaled Saeed
